tool.datetime.description: Datetime allows you to get current time and date of this machine.
tool.datetime.date.description: Get this machine's current date in format like 2026-01-11.
tool.datetime.time.description: Get this machine's current time in format like 12:34:56+08.
tool.file.description: File Tools allows you to read, write, and manage files inside the session workspace.
tool.file.read.description: Read the content of a file inside the session workspace.
tool.file.write.description: Write content to a file inside the session workspace.
tool.file.info.description: Get metadata of a file or directory inside the session workspace.
tool.file.list.description: List files and directories inside a path in the session workspace.
tool.file.dir.description: Get the absolute path of the current session workspace directory.
tool.file.delete.description: Delete a file inside the session workspace.
tool.file.grep.description: Search for a keyword in a file and return all matching lines with their line numbers.
tool.file.replace.description: Replace occurrences of a specific text in a file. Set line to 0 to replace all occurrences, or specify a line number to restrict replacement to that line.
tool.system.description: System Info Tool can get system information and current running status.
tool.system.os_info.description: Get system information including CPU, memory, disk, and OS details.
tool.system.process_list.description: List all running processes sorted by CPU usage.
tool.system.process_info.description: Get detailed information about a specific process by PID.
tool.system.process_kill.description: Kill a running process by PID.
tool.memory_kv.description: Memory KV Tools allows you to storage the memory with Key-Value into database and read or write it anytime.
tool.memory_kv.get.description: Retrieve a value from memory by key.
tool.memory_kv.set.description: Store a value in memory by key. Creates the key if it does not exist.
tool.memory_kv.delete.description: Delete a key-value pair from memory.
tool.memory_md.description: Memory Markdown Tools allows you to read and write chat-specific markdown file in maximum of 64KB, if it's valid, you can call it as need before getting the response, or write it after the response. For assistant, please be often to read and write by calling this tool.
tool.memory_md.get.description: Read the chat-specific markdown memory file.
tool.memory_md.set.description: Write markdown content to the chat-specific memory file. Maximum 64KB.
tool.cron.description: Cronjob allows you to execute command at a constant time or delay, you can even use crontab expressions.
tool.cron.get.description: Get details of a scheduled job by name.
tool.cron.list.description: List all scheduled jobs for the current chat.
tool.cron.delete.description: Delete a scheduled job by name.
tool.browser.description: Web Browser Tool gives unlimited ability for models to search for the Internet, capture webpages, surfing the Internet or download files. Also, you can use CloudFlare's browser use to proxy in order to hide real IP.
tool.browser.search.description: Search the web using a search engine and return the results.
tool.browser.webpage.description: Fetch and return the content of a webpage by URL.
tool.browser.log.downloading: [Browser] No local browser found, downloading now...
tool.browser.log.fallback_browser: [Browser] Could not fetch content directly, falling back to browser...
tool.browser.log.purge_open_doc_failed: [Browser] Failed to open document while processing response
tool.browser.log.purge_body_failed: [Browser] Failed to extract body while processing response
tool.browser.log.purge_markdown_failed: [Browser] Failed to convert HTML to markdown
tool.request.description: Manboster Request Tool enables models to make HTTP/HTTPS requests manually.
tool.request.machine.description: Use this request tool to make HTTP/HTTPS requests and get detailed response.
tool.shell.description: [THIS IS A DANGEROUS TOOL, IF YOU DONT KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING PLEASE DO NOT USE OR INSTALL IT] shell execution tool enables model to execute native shells in the system. Root Access only.
tool.shell.machine.description: This tool can execute any command on this machine and be careful before using it.
